name: Ata

skills.name: Child of the Sea
skills.description: Loss of life is temporarily stored in a gray shield form, during which 40%/15% of the equivalent gray shield of damage dealt to heroes/non-heroes is converted into blood, scaling up based on extra life. Basic attacks come with additional physical damage.

skills.name: Wavewalking
skills.description: Endeavor to jump up and deal physical damage to smashed enemies when you land. Afterwards, bounce up again, dealing the same damage as well as a 0.5 second knockback effect when you land. Immunity to control during the jump. When attacking multiple enemies at once, damage decays by 20% for each additional enemy, down to 60%. Increases damage to minions by an additional 30%.

skills.name: Sea Anchor
skills.description: Throw the anchor straight out to hit enemies in front of you, dealing physical damage and 60% slow for 1.5 seconds. If the anchor is embedded in a wall, Ata will use the force to dash himself and the enemy to that spot. When it hits the wall, it deals Physical damage and stuns for 0.5 seconds. [Passive]: after using [Anchor], the next basic attack within 3 seconds will pull the enemy back with the anchor.

skills.name: Ghost Ship

skills.name: Fiery Temper

name: Yixing

skills.name: Maintaining Initiative
skills.description: Basic Attacks deal magical damage. For every 4 skill hits on the same enemy, generates a Weiqi stone that deals magical damage and adds to the total number of Weiqi stones. Gains brief immunity to all damage and increased Movement Speed upon taking fatal damage.

skills.name: Sliding Stones
skills.description: Places a Weiqi stone at the target location, gaining vision and damaging enemies. Weiqi stones will be pulled into Skill 2's Weiqi formation, damaging and slowing enemies in their path.

skills.name: Taking Liberties
skills.description: Deals damage to the target area and creates a Weiqi formation. The formation pulls enemies toward its center, damaging them in the process.

skills.name: The World is My Board
skills.description: Draws a Weiqi board that launches enemies and places marks on them while exposing their location. Enemies caught within the Weiqi board are bound and will be unable to leave. When the Weiqi board is fully formed, his Movement Speed is increased.

name: Flowborn (Mage)

skills.name: Flow of the World
skills.description:
Can change Flow states at the Base to enhance stats.
Spends 1 stack of Flow to perform an enhanced Basic Attack that deals area damage.

skills.name: Convergence
skills.description:
Channels the Flow, reducing the cooldown of other skills by 50%. Also gains 5–9 stacks of Flow based on the number of nearby heroes and minions and recovers Health based on Flow stacks.
Damages and knocks back nearby enemies (without applying crowd control).

skills.name: Flow Formation
skills.description:
Deals damage and slows enemies within range, then deals damage over time.
Using the skill repeatedly within a short time enhances it, dealing damage and launching or stunning enemies. When new magic circles overlap with the initial one, they increase its damage and refresh its duration.
Can spend 4 stacks of Flow to use the skill without triggering cooldown.

skills.name: Arcane Arts
skills.description:
Continuously channels a beam to deal damage over time.
While the beam is linked with a hero, continuously throws Energy Bombs that deal area damage.
Can spend 5 stacks of Flow to stop the skill from entering cooldown after this use.

name: Musashi

skills.name: Niten Ichiryuu
skills.description: Using skills generates Vigor, which is consumed by Basic Attacks to gain enhancement effects. Hitting an enemy reduces the cooldown of Skills 1 and Skills 2. Vigor can stack up to two times. 1 Vigor: Enhances Basic Attack damage. 2 Vigor: Dashes and slows enemies.

skills.name: Illuminating Slash
skills.description: Unleashes sword energy in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies in its path and knocking down projectiles. Becomes immune to crowd control when using the skill.

skills.name: Extreme Speed
skills.description: Dashes in the target direction, dealing damage and gaining a shield upon hitting an enemy.

skills.name: Duel to the Death
skills.description: Dashes to the target, launching them and dealing damage to enemies within range, while delaying the target's recovery effects.

tips: Musashi is a Medium Assassin (Jungling) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 50.7% win rate and 1.1% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Rapacious Bite → Boots of Resistance → Axe of Torment → Frostscar's Embrace → Succubus Cloak → Cuirass of Savagery.
Mutation arcana for assassin burst on Vigor autos. Smite standard; Purify vs heavy CC.
Gank: Extreme Speed → AA (2× Vigor) → Illuminating Slash → Duel to the Death → chase.
Laning: Full clear to level four with Vigor management—never gank at half health. Secure Tyrant when bot/mid has crash wave; prioritize the lane without Flash.
Teamfight: Wait for hard CC, then Duel to the Death the carry. Use Illuminating Slash to block key projectiles before diving. Exit with Skill 2 if anti-heal does not secure the kill.
Musashi excels into Diaochan, Luna, Shangguan. Avoid blind picking into Dyadia, Sun Bin without team peel.

Musashi is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 50.7% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 1.1% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Musashi.

skills.description: Gains damage immunity when Health falls below 30%. Basic Attacks deal extra damage to different units every 5s.

skills.name: Righteous Fervor
skills.description: Dashes forward and knocks back enemies. At the end of the dash, launches the enemy and deals damage.

skills.name: No Retreat
skills.description: Slows nearby enemies in range and reduces their damage output while dealing damage.Passive: Gains extra Health for every extra point of Physical Defense.

skills.name: Hegemon's Slash
skills.description: Deals damage to enemies in the target direction. Inflicts extra damage andstun on enemies close by.The lower his Health, the higher the damage.He gains invulnerability whilethe skill is being released, preventing his Health from falling below 1.

tips: Xiang Yu is a Easy Tank (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 50.7% win rate and 0.8% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Boots of Resistance → Eye of the Phoenix → Blazing Cape → Spikemail → Longnight Guardian.
Run Fate for stats that match Xiang Yu's Tank kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Righteous Fervor → No Retreat → Hegemon's Slash → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.
Laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
Teamfight: Engage on enemy carry when your team has follow-up. Body-block skillshots for your marksman.
Xiang Yu excels into Dharma, Arthur. Avoid blind picking into Han Xin, Kui, Lam without team peel.

Xiang Yu is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 50.7% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 0.8% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Xiang Yu.

skills.name: Moon's Farewell

Upon entering, she gains a shield, and her skill cooldowns are shorter. If she uses this skill again while inside the mirage, she moves 700 units away from the target.

skills.description: Releases a tether that links to the first enemy hit. Damages and slows over time. Steals Physical and Magical Attack while recovering Health.

skills.name: Umbral Moon
skills.description: Removes debuffs, gains Movement Speed, and becomes untargetable. Deals damage to nearby enemies upon entering and exiting the untargetable state.

name: Umbrosa

skills.name: Whirling Featherblades
skills.description: Mark Damage When attacking at a distance, Basic Attacks throw a blade that returns to her. She can hit the blade as it returns to bounce it back at the enemy, dealing increased damage with each rebound. When attacking nearby targets, she enters melee mode and attacks faster. Basic Attacks mark targets. Marked enemies take extra damage from Skill 2.

skills.name: Feverish Dance
skills.description: Enhance Damage Slow Sweeps the surrounding area, damaging and slowing nearby enemies. Then enters Frenzied state, gaining a major boost to Movement Speed and Attack Speed.

skills.name: Feathered Tempest
skills.description: Damage Recovery Movement Dashes forward, damaging and knocking back enemies. Also triggers Featherblade marks and spreads them to nearby enemies. Then, throws rebounding blades at enemies in front, dealing damage and recovering Health. Each hit consumes 1 mark to deal extra damage.

skills.name: Final Frenzy
skills.description: Indomitable Enhance Damage Damages nearby enemies and gains Movement Speed. Also enters the Indomitable state for 4s, gaining temporary Health. If she is defeated while this skill is not on cooldown, she resurrects after a short delay, damaging nearby enemies. The skill will then enter cooldown. '''Passive:''' Upgrading this skill increases Skill 2 and melee Basic Attack damage. The Indomitable state ends immediately if she loses all of her temporary Health.

faqs.question: How to counter Milady?
faqs.answer: Pick Allain, Fuzi, Haya into Milady. Deny Mid Lane resources early and force fights before Milady completes core items. Milady struggles when the enemy can out-range or out-sustain them.

faqs.question: Who does Milady counter?
faqs.answer: Milady is strong into Nakoruru, Pei, Mai Shiranui according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Milady when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Mid Lane lane.

faqs.question: Is Milady good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Milady is a Tier S+ staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Ban rate 2.4% — expect Milady to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role. Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.

faqs.answer: Milady is tagged Mid Lane in Camp export (Mage). Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.

name: Luna

skills.name: Moonlight Dance
skills.description: Every three Basic Attacks form a repeating cycle. On the first, she dashes toward the target, and on the third, she deals damage to nearby enemies and places a mark on them. Increasing Magical Attack also increases Attack Speed

skills.name: Crescent Slice
skills.description: Unleashes a shockwave in the target direction, dealing damage and marking enemies hit.

skills.name: Searing Stab
skills.description: Gains a shield and pulls nearby enemies, dealing damage while stunning slowing, and marking them.

skills.name: New Moon
skills.description: Dashes in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies in her path. Upon hitting marked enemies, her Ultimate's cooldown will be refreshed.

name: Lam

skills.name: Hunter
skills.description: Basic Attacks and skills deal extra true damage to targets with low Health

skills.name: Wavebreaker
skills.description: Lam enters “Submerged” state, greatly increasing his Movement Speed for 3 seconds. When the duration ends, Lam leaps out of the water, immediately restoring 50% of this skill’s cooldown. While in Submerged state, casting the skill again will cause Lam to surface early, dealing 300 (+120% Bonus Physical Attack) Physical Damage to nearby enemies and slowing their Movement Speed by 50% for 1.5 seconds. Passive: While in river terrain, the Submerged state has no time limit. If an enemy hero with below 30% Health appears within 1500 range, Lam gains 450 Movement Speed.

skills.name: Space Split
skills.description: Damages nearby enemies while gaining a mark. Basic Attacks spend marks to gain a dash and Health recovery effect. While submerged, Skill 2 has an extra dash effect.

skills.name: Death From Below
skills.description: Throws a dagger in the target direction, then dashes to the dagger after a short delay, dragging enemies in his path to the dagger and dealing damage to them. Submerged: Cancels the cast animation and skill delay.

Laning: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
Teamfight: Wait for CC from your team, then dive carry with full combo. Exit with reset or flash if focus fired.

name: Donghuang

skills.name: Soul Sacrifice

skills.name: Forsaken Contract

name: Flowborn (Tank)

skills.name: Flow of the World
skills.description:
Can change Flow states at the Base to enhance stats.
Vitality: Increases max Health and Physical and Magical Defense.
Piercing Heart: Increases max Health and Physical Attack.
Haste: Increases max Health and Movement Speed.
Focus: Increases max Health and Cooldown Reduction.
Spend 1 stack of Flow to perform an enhanced Basic Attack and deal damage and gain recovery.

skills.name: Convergence
skills.description:
Channels the Flow, reducing the cooldown of other skills by 50%. Also gains 5–9 stacks of Flow based on the number of nearby heroes and minions and recovers Health based on Flow stacks.
Damages and knocks back nearby enemies (without applying crowd control).

skills.name: Power From Within
skills.description:
Charges at the target and slashes, dealing damage, launching enemies, and gaining a shield.
Using the skill continuously over a short time converts it to Clearing Slash and Rifting Slash.
If the skill is not on cooldown, spend 4 stacks of Flow to stop it from entering cooldown after use.

skills.name: All In
skills.description:
Leaps to the target location and attacks, dealing damage and launching enemies.
If the skill is not on cooldown, spend 5 stacks of Flow to stop it from entering cooldown after this use.

Standard trade: Convergence → Power From Within → All In → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.
Laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
Teamfight: Engage on enemy carry when your team has follow-up. Body-block skillshots for your marksman.

name: Ao'yin

skills.name: Hidden Dragon
skills.description: The Dragon Souls from his last 2 skill uses grant effects to his Basic Attacks, which deal physical damage to up to two enemies. He gains 1 mark upon using skills, for up to 3 marks. Basic Attacks expend all marks for various effects, striking once per mark.

skills.name: Flaming Palm
skills.description: Deals physical damage and true damage. Attaches a Fire Dragon Soul to his sword. Basic Attacks deal more damage when this Soul is attached. Enhanced Basic Attacks will deal both physical damage and true damage.

skills.name: Downpour
skills.description: Deals physical damage and recovers Health upon hit. Attaches a Water Dragon Soul to his sword. Basic Attacks restore Health and Mana when this Soul is attached. Enhanced Basic Attacks will deal physical damage and restore Health, but restore less for hits on non-hero units.

skills.name: Riding the Wind
skills.description: Gains Movement Speed that diminishes over time, deals physical damage, and knocks back enemies. Attaches a Wind Dragon Soul to his sword. Gains Movement Speed while this Soul is attached, 50% extra if on both swords. Enhanced Basic Attacks will deal physical damage and knock back enemies.

tips: Ao'yin is a Medium Marksman (Farm Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S+ with 48.4% win rate and 1.6% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.

Run Penetration for stats that match Ao'yin's Marksman kit. Take Flash & Execute — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Flaming Palm → Downpour → Riding the Wind → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.
Laning: Last-hit safely until first core item. Ping jungler for river vision; never face-check brush without minion cover.
Teamfight: Position behind frontline; attack closest safe target. Join fight only after enemy dive cooldowns are used.
Ao'yin excels into Liu Bei, Athena, Zilong. Avoid blind picking into Kaizer, Dun, Arthur without team peel.

skills.name: Bloodthirsty Ancestry
skills.description: Becomes enhanced when Skill 1 or Ultimate hits an enemy hero. While enhanced, Basic Attacks, Skill 1, and Ultimate deal true damage and restore Health.

skills.name: Impaling Thrust
skills.description: Performs a sweep attack to the target area. Restores a certain amount of Health with each enemy hero hit. Failing to hit a hero will cause the enhancement to disappear.

skills.name: Souleater
skills.description: Slows enemies in the target area and grants a shield for each enemy hit (upto 3 stacks). The shield value is converted to Health over time.

skills.name: Tremble, Mortals
skills.description: Leaps to the target location, launching and damaging enemies within range upon landing, then forming a killing field. While inside the killing field, he gains increased Physical and Magical Defense, while enemies suffer damage and slow.

skills.name: Melodic Swing
skills.description: Enhances her next Basic Attack periodically to swing toward the enemy, dealing damage and knocking them back, then jumping back. When any hero receives Blessing of Fate or Bitter Reconciliation, she earns Gold and reduces the preparation time of her enhanced Basic Attack.

skills.name: Heartlink
skills.description: Blesses a teammate and restores Health. When two blessed teammates come close, they recover Health and gain Movement Speed. If she blesses an already blessed teammate, she will dash to them, and both recover Health and gain Movement Speed. Can use this skill again within 5s.

skills.name: Bitter Farewell
skills.description: Marks an enemy, exposes them and deals continuous damage. When two marked enemies come close, they stop taking damage. If she uses the skill on a marked enemy, she will dash to them, immobilizing them and dealing continuous damage. Can use this skill again within 5s.

skills.name: Destined Encounter

skills.description: Heino gains damage reduction and crowd control immunity, recovers Health, but cannot move. After 1.5s, he deals magical damage and travels back in time. The allied tower within range travels 5s back in time. He recovers more Health the less he has left.

skills.name: Deer Spirit

name: Augran

skills.name: Soul Resonance
skills.description: Basic Attacks can connect to an enemy's soul, dealing damage continuously unless the enemy breaks free. When the connection ends, it deals a large amount of damage.

skills.name: Path of Passing
skills.description: Slashes open a path to the afterlife, dealing damage to enemies hit. The path accelerates when it hits walls or the Life-Death Border, then deals extra damage. By traversing on the path, he can ignore terrain and gain Movement Speed. Hitting a wall for the first time generates an afterlife bridge, and he gains Movement Speed when crossing the bridge while enemies nearby are slowed. Using this skill again causes him to enter the Seer State.

skills.name: Death's Precipice
skills.description: Deals damage and inflicts slow on enemies to the front, then generates a Life-Death Border which damages, slows, and marks enemies who touch it. His next Basic Attack additionally attacks up to 3 marked targets, dealing extra damage and recovering his Health.

skills.name: Conductor of Souls
skills.description: Descends from the sky, damaging and knocking back nearby enemies. Hitting an enemy hero will recover his Health and summon their spirit counterpart to assist him. Enters the Seer State after, in which his Basic Attacks will kill targets with low Health instantly.

name: Dolia

skills.name: Mermaid's Gift
skills.description: Dolia takes on mermaid form when in water (rivers are also considered water), reducing the slows taken by 50% and returning life and mana every second. The mermaid form's Basic Attacks will shoot water arrows for ranged damage. Dolia's [Recovery] is replaced with [Mermaid's Gift], which allows her to create a pact with a selected teammate, and prioritizes her pacted teammate when using [Celestial Melody].

skills.name: Ode
skills.description: Dolia chants 4 sound waves that spread outward, the first 3 dealing spell damage and 10% slow. The 4th deals more spell damage and 50% slow for 1 second. The sound waves also echo when they hit an enemy, dealing spell damage to those they touch and, if released in water, sending waves of water knocking back nearby enemies (knockback of enemies around you has a stun effect). Non-heroic units provoke a much smaller echo, dealing only 50% of the damage.

skills.name: Wavemaker
skills.description: Lam enters “Submerged” state, greatly increasing his Movement Speed for 3 seconds. When the duration ends, Lam leaps out of the water, immediately restoring 50% of this skill’s cooldown. While in Submerged state, casting the skill again will cause Lam to surface early, dealing 300 (+120% Bonus Physical Attack) Physical Damage to nearby enemies and slowing their Movement Speed by 50% for 1.5 seconds. Passive: While in river terrain, the Submerged state has no time limit. If an enemy hero with below 30% Health appears within 1500 range, Lam gains 450 Movement Speed.

skills.name: Celestial Melody
skills.description: After Dolia briefly chants, refresh the skill with the longest current cooldown of a friendly within range, taking more cooldown from yourself. If a teammate's skill is not used after being refreshed, [Celestial Melody]'s cooldown recovery speed can be accelerated by 20/30/40%. Teammates do not consume Mana or Energy when using the skill for 5 seconds after the skill is refreshed, and the beatdown benefit caused by the skill is split equally with Dolia. Refreshing skills for contracted teammates is prioritized, followed by non-contracted teammates, or refreshing your own skills if there are no teammates nearby. Failure to refresh a skill returns most of the cooldown of [Celestial Melody].

Laning: Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.
Teamfight: Peel carry first, then look for pick on out-of-position enemies. Ward Tyrant 30s before spawn.

name: Jing

skills.name: Lethal Reflections
skills.description: Jing and her image apply 2 different types of marks on enemies when they deal damage. If an enemy has both types of mark at the same time, they take damage and the cooldowns of Skill 1 and Skill 2 are reset.

skills.name: Reflective Assault
skills.description:
Dashes forward, damaging enemies in her path and slowing them while enhancing her next Basic Attack.
If no mirror image is present on the battlefield, one will be created to fight alongside her.

skills.name: Shattered Illusions
skills.description:
Deals damage to nearby enemies while recovering Health and gaining increased Movement Speed.
If no mirror image is present on the battlefield, then one will be created to fight alongside her.

skills.name: Mirror Domain
skills.description: Dashes forward, pulling enemies to the center of her magic circle and immobilizing them there. She gains damage reduction while inside the circle, and recovers Health when she swaps locations.

tips: Jing is a Medium Assassin (Jungling) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 45.5% win rate and 0.4% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Boots of Resistance → Rapacious Bite → Axe of Torment → Master Sword → Cuirass of Savagery.
Run Mutation for stats that match Jing's Assassin kit. Take Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Reflective Assault → Shattered Illusions → Mirror Domain → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.
Laning: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
Teamfight: Wait for CC from your team, then dive carry with full combo. Exit with reset or flash if focus fired.
Jing excels into Dharma, Ata, Lian Po. Avoid blind picking into Angela, Daji, Gan & Mo without team peel.

Jing sits at Tier B globally (45.5% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.
